description_long: This object is a rectangular, vertically-oriented snack package with a slim profile and a hard-edged, box-like shape. The front and back faces are flat, with the back featuring detailed printed information, including a colorful brand logo at the top and a nutrition facts panel below. The sides and top are plain and uniformly colored, likely made of cardboard or a similar material, with a matte or semi-gloss finish. The back face is predominantly dark with white and colored text, while the rest of the package is a solid, light gray. The object appears to be sealed and unopened, typical of packaged snack foods found in urban retail environments. Its size and form suggest it is designed for easy handling and portability.
description: A slim, rectangular snack package with a plain light gray exterior and a detailed, dark-printed back featuring branding and nutritional information.
description_view_0: The side view shows the slim, rectangular profile with a plain, light gray surface and no visible text or graphics.
description_view_1: Another angled side view, highlighting the uniform light gray color and the box's thickness, with no visible branding.
description_view_2: The back angled view reveals detailed printed information, a colorful brand logo at the top, and a nutrition facts panel.
description_view_3: The full back view displays the brand logo, extensive product information, and nutritional labeling on a dark background.
attribute_brand_logo: A colorful, circular brand logo is visible at the top center of the back face, featuring blue, green, and white colors.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel and ingredients list are visible on the back face, printed in white and yellow text.
